description: Per-customer validation rule set. This file IS the product surface: the three agents are generic, this config is what makes the pipeline customer-specific. One engine, many configs.

consignee_name.note: Allow minor variants (Acme Imports Limited, ACME IMPORTS LTD) via semantic match.

hs_code.note: Must be valid HS format AND one of Acme's contracted commodity codes.

port_of_loading.note: Acme only sources from these CN ports. Semantic match tolerates 'Port of Shanghai, CN'.

incoterms.note: Acme contracts are FOB or CIF only. Anything else is a mismatch requiring amendment.

description_of_goods.note: Goods must be consistent with the contracted HS codes (computers).

routing_policy.auto_approve_requires: all fields match AND every field confidence >= min_field_confidence
routing_policy.amendment_when: one or more deterministic mismatches (wrong value, fixable by supplier)
routing_policy.human_review_when: any uncertain field, ungrounded value (no source_quote), or confidence below threshold
